name: Pork with Green Beans and Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Green beans, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice and prepare all ingredients.
2. Heat oil in a wok over moderately high heat. Add pork and onions to the wok and stir-fry for two minutes.
3. Add soya sauce, beans, salt, and 3/4 cup of water. Stir well. Cover the wok and cook for six minutes at medium-high heat. Shake the lid occasionally to ensure even cooking.
4. Add mushrooms and cook for an additional three minutes with the lid still on.
5. Remove the lid once or twice to stir the ingredients and mix them thoroughly.
6. Mix corn starch with 1/2 cup of water until smooth. Lift off the lid, add the starch mixture to form a gravy.
7. Turn off the heat.
